overview: A personal home bodybuilding app with an interactive 3D exercise library, a customizable weekly workout scheduler, and workout tracking. Covers all home bodyweight exercises with animated 3D demonstrations and step-by-step instructions.
features: Step-by-step instructions for all home bodyweight exercises
Exercises organized by muscle group (chest, back, legs, arms, shoulders, core)
Add, remove, and reorder exercises in your schedule
Workout session tracking with reps/sets logging
